name: godot-superpowers
description: Single-plugin marketplace for godot-superpowers — full-spectrum Godot 4.x game development plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: godot-superpowers
plugins.description: 26 skills, 13 subagents, hooks (gdformat / gdlint / .tscn validation / file-verifier dispatch reminder), MCP integration. Covers scaffolding, components, state machines, save systems, GUT tests, shaders, audio, export pipelines, genre packs, and a subagent dev mode (orchestrator + file-verifier) for token-efficient milestone execution.
